## What Changed

Describe the behavior, documentation or operational change.

## Why

Explain the problem this solves.

## Testing

List the commands you ran, for example:

```bash
cd bank-flow-ledger && ./gradlew test
```

## Checklist

- [ ] The PR is focused and avoids unrelated refactors.
- [ ] Tests were added or updated for non-trivial behavior.
- [ ] Relevant README, docs, dashboard or event examples were updated.
- [ ] Service ownership boundaries are preserved.
- [ ] Trace, metric or Kafka label changes are documented.
